About Plumber4me

Your local plumbing and heating experts

Meet Liam & Jacob — Your Local Plumbing Team

Plumber4me is a trusted, family-run plumbing and heating service based right here in South Normanton, Alfreton. Owner Liam, assisted by Jacob, provides a genuine 24-hour emergency service — meaning when your boiler breaks down at midnight or your pipes burst on a Sunday morning, they'll be there.

Specialising in boiler repairs, shower installations, radiator fixes, sink plumbing, and full central heating systems, Plumber4me is known across Derbyshire for rapid response times — including out-of-hours call-outs that others won't touch. Customers consistently praise the team for honest pricing, going above and beyond, and truly caring about the job.

Liam personally responds to every review because your experience matters. Whether it's a small fix or a major emergency, you'll always get the same premium service.

Our Services

Professional plumbing & heating solutions for every situation

⚡

24-Hour Emergency Plumbing

Burst pipes, leaks, or flooding at any hour — day or night. We respond fast when you need us most, including weekends and bank holidays.

🔥

Boiler Repairs & Servicing

Expert diagnosis and repair of all boiler makes and models. Annual servicing to keep your system running safely and efficiently year-round.

🌡️

Central Heating Systems

Full central heating installation, repair, and maintenance. From cold radiators to complete system upgrades, we've got you covered.

🚿

Shower & Bathroom Plumbing

Shower installations, repairs, and bathroom plumbing solutions. We fix leaks, low pressure, and faulty valves with minimal disruption.

🔧

Radiator Installation & Repair

Cold spots, noisy radiators, or need additional heat? We install, repair, bleed, and power-flush radiators for optimal performance.

🚰

Sinks, Taps & Pipework

Dripping taps, blocked sinks, and pipe replacements handled quickly and cleanly. We also carry out water supply valve replacements.

Real reviews from real customers
